name: Jira Post-Commit Update
description: After a successful commit, generates an LLM diff summary and posts it as a comment to the referenced Jira ticket(s).

then.prompt: If the last shell command was a successful git commit, run the post-commit Jira update: extract ticket IDs from the commit message, generate a diff summary, and post it as a comment to the Jira ticket. Use the project's src/post-commit.ts orchestrator logic. If the last command was not a git commit, do nothing.
